label: Public Domain
usageNotes: Preferred for live app display when the specific asset page confirms public-domain status or U.S. Government origin.

label: CC0
usageNotes: Commercially safe for live display when the asset metadata is complete and the release is verified.

label: CC BY
usageNotes: Allowed by the model only when attribution metadata is complete, but not used for default commercial-safe live rendering.

label: CC BY-SA
usageNotes: Allowed by the model only when attribution metadata is complete, but not used for default commercial-safe live rendering.

label: Unknown
usageNotes: Blocked from import and live display unless the license is later reviewed and explicitly verified.
